title: IMBS
description:
IMBS (Infinite’s Motion Blur System) is one of the first motion blur mods for Minecraft Fabric 1.21, focused on smooth visuals, easy tuning, and good performance.

body:
IMBS (Infinite’s Motion Blur System) is one of the first motion blur mods for Minecraft Fabric 1.21, focused on smooth visuals, easy tuning, and good performance.
